severity_rule: deaths>=1000 OR damage>=$10B OR affected>=10M -> CRITICAL; deaths>=100 OR damage>=$1B OR affected>=1M -> HIGH; deaths>=10 OR damage>=$100M OR affected>=100K -> MEDIUM; else LOW
